name: Kernel
description: Post-dispatch unified view - all providers merge here

name: C_1
description: Stratum 1 validated artifacts admitted for realization

name: C_2
description: Stratum 2 materialized graph-ready programs and structures

name: Projected
column14: Projected views in the Lens_i family

name: C_4
description: Stratum 4 projected views and surface bindings

name: Evaluated
column14: Contingent graph state after execution or replay

name: platform
description: Platform objects - distribution and workstation config

name: User
description: Authenticated actor — container whose morphisms grant owned-workspace access edges. No special ontological status.

name: ColliderAdmin
description: Category administrator — elevated actor with governed OWNS edges to assigned containers.

name: SuperAdmin
description: Root administrator — transitive OWNS over all containers.

name: AppTemplate
description: Template container — reusable subgraph pattern. Instantiation = ADD + LINK sequence.

name: NodeContainer
description: General-purpose container — default object in C. Payload in state_payload JSONB.

name: AgnosticModel
description: LLM/ML model container — provider-agnostic URN. Provider config in state_payload.

name: SystemTool
description: Tool container — discovered via graph traversal; exposed via MCP protocol surface.

name: UI_Lens
description: UI rendering surface — functor output: containers × wires → React component tree.

name: RuntimeSurface
description: Execution surface — HTTP/WS/MCP endpoint. Tools wire here to become executable.

name: ComputeResource
description: GPU device; Docker container; thread pool; VM — schedulable resource container.

name: ProtocolAdapter
description: WS channel; MCP session; gRPC stream; HTTP endpoint — routable communication container.

name: InfraService
description: Postgres instance; disk volume; network segment — persistable infrastructure container.

name: MemoryStore
description: Vector embedding store; context window; conversation history — ephemeral or persistent memory container.

name: PlatformConfig
description: Platform distribution configuration — paths; store mode; build targets. Typed representation of distribution.json entries.

name: WorkstationConfig
description: Workstation environment descriptor — OS; runtime ports; optional services. Typed representation of workstation.json entries.

name: Preference
description: Runtime preference — key-value wire_config with scope (system/workspace/user/session). Typed representation of preferences.json entries.

name: Provider
description: LLM/AI provider container — adapter_type; API config; rate limits. OWNS model containers (OBJ06). Typed representation of providers.json entries.

name: BenchmarkSuite
description: Named benchmark collection — groups BenchmarkTask entries. Definition object; immutable after creation.

name: BenchmarkTask
description: Individual benchmark task definition — prompt template; expected morphisms; difficulty. Immutable after creation.

name: BenchmarkScore
description: Benchmark result record — model’s scores on a task within a suite. Immutable once recorded. Sources MOR14/15/16.

name: AgentSpec
description: Agent specification container — model binding; tool routing; state sync. The configured persona that acts on behalf of a User.

name: CAN_HYDRATE
column14: Hydration permission — declared transitivity controlled by manifest/wire_config.

name: PRE_FLIGHT_CONFIG
column14: Runtime configuration — sets initial state before activation.

name: SYNC_ACTIVE_STATE
column14: State synchronization — surface pushes current state to container.

name: ADD_NODE_CONTAINER
column14: Create + wire container into ownership tree.

name: LINK_NODES
column14: General-purpose wiring — creates edge with specified port types.

name: UNLINK_EDGE
column14: Remove wire. Container persists. May create orphan nodes. (Renamed from DELETE_EDGE in v2 to align with §3 canonical NT name.)

name: CAN_SCHEDULE
column14: Workload allocation — kernel/admin schedules work to compute resource.

name: CAN_ROUTE
column14: Transport selection — protocol adapter routes traffic.

name: CAN_PERSIST
column14: Storage routing — container persists state through infra.

name: CAN_FEDERATE
column14: Cross-instance communication — morphism bundle exchange between mo:os instances.

name: CAN_FORK
column14: Branch parallel exploration — fork active state graph into GPU VRAM for parallel DAG scoring.

name: SCORED_ON
column14: Model achieved this benchmark score. New in v3 — cross-provider mapping (§9).

name: EVALUATES_TASK
column14: Score applies to this task definition. New in v3 — cross-provider mapping (§9).

name: BENCHMARKED_BY
column14: Score belongs to this benchmark suite. New in v3 — cross-provider mapping (§9).
